title: Interview Scheduled
body: Your identity review interview is scheduled for 15 March 2026 at 10:00 AM, Room 204.

title: Food Distribution — Zone B
body: Food packages available at Distribution Point B, Tuesday and Thursday 08:00–12:00.

title: Additional Documents Needed
body: Please submit any available education records or employment references to your case officer.

title: Employment Opportunity
body: Translation services position available through partner agency RefuWork. Contact your case manager.
